DISCOVERY, 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS IT WAS NOT TIMELY NOTICED. C.C.P. SECTION 1005, AS AMENDED AND EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1, 2005, REQUIRES THAT MOTIONS BE SERVED AND FILED 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING WITH FIVE DAYS ADDED IF SERVED BY MAIL. AS THIS MOTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 3, 2005, THE NEW PROVISIONS APPLY. THE FIRST DAY THIS MOTION COULD BE NOTICED FOR IS JANUARY 26, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
